title: How to get a police certificate – Cabo Verde - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Cabo Verde
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Criminal record certificate

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### For residents of Cape-Vert
Apply online via e-residencia.gov.cv or in person through the Citizen’s shops .
An application can also be submitted to the Identification and Migration Service (SIM) or the relevant police services.

### For residents outside Cape-Vert
Submit an application to the embassy or consulate.
